name: Useless Heart
description:
“Good for nothing, love of mine.”

[ cupioromantic valentines ]

.

Imagine how terrible it is when your own heart turns on you. What would you do then? Would you rip it out and put an end to it like Cameron? Or would you hurt yourself to teach your heart a lesson? In any case, having the ability to be in a relationship but not the capacity to love is a disaster waiting to happen, and the worst part is, it’s always obvious when.

[Art by: @sgguzz]

| Theme Song |

[ despair - leo ]

“It’s not love, I swear. It might be closer to despair.”

Summary:

Cameron Allupar is a 20 year old boy who’s lonely and depressed at a party. He was dragged here out of his own will, or maybe he was deceived into coming here. But there’s something special about him: he’s cupioromantic; he cannot feel love but wants to be in love.

(he just like me ;v;)

[week 10]
creator: shokokokok
